page.heroDescription: Discover our successfully completed projects in web development, AI integration, and custom software solutions. Each project tells its own success story.
page.sectionSubtitle: Filter by category to discover the most relevant projects for you.
page.noProjects: No projects found in this category.

detail.notFoundSub: The requested project does not exist.

united-nations-fp2030.title: United Nations – FP2030!
united-nations-fp2030.description: Design implementation for the United Nations FP2030 Progress Report website, featuring interactive Highcharts data visualizations and immersive parallax animations.
united-nations-fp2030.overview: We had the incredible opportunity to collaborate with the United Nations in developing a remarkable website for FP2030. This project was truly exceptional and allowed us to showcase our expertise and creativity in some truly innovative ways.
united-nations-fp2030.goal: Build a visually stunning, data-driven website for the United Nations FP2030 initiative that presents complex global health data through interactive charts and immersive animations.
united-nations-fp2030.problem: Complex global health data needed to be presented in an accessible, engaging way that would resonate with a worldwide audience.
united-nations-fp2030.solution: A visually stunning website combining interactive Highcharts data visualizations, captivating parallax animations, and user-centric design.

mpa-online.title: MPA.online Streaming Platform!
mpa-online.description: Fullstack web app development for a medical education streaming platform, built with Next.js, Strapi, and MongoDB with Vimeo integration.
mpa-online.overview: MPA.online is a streaming platform designed to help medical assistants learn through video courses. Built over approximately 6 months with Next.js and Strapi.
mpa-online.goal: Develop a fully functional streaming platform for medical education with structured video courses and seamless search.
mpa-online.problem: Medical assistants lacked a dedicated, structured platform to learn essential clinical skills through video-based education.
mpa-online.solution: A fullstack streaming platform built with Next.js and Strapi, featuring Vimeo video integration and MongoDB-powered search.

miso-supermarket.title: Miso Supermarket & Bakery!
miso-supermarket.description: Modern web design and digital solution for a local supermarket with integrated online shop and ordering system.
miso-supermarket.overview: Miso Supermarket & Bakery is a local family-run business in Düsseldorf offering fresh baked goods and Asian groceries.
miso-supermarket.goal: Build a professional online presence with an integrated ordering and shop system.
miso-supermarket.problem: No online presence; customers couldn't pre-order — leading to long wait times and revenue loss.
miso-supermarket.solution: Responsive website with integrated online shop, real-time ordering system, and Google Maps integration.

techvision-dashboard.title: TechVision Dashboard!
techvision-dashboard.description: Complete redesign of an enterprise dashboard with modern UI/UX design and responsive layout.
techvision-dashboard.overview: TechVision is a growing SaaS company that provides real-time analytics tools for mid-sized businesses.
techvision-dashboard.goal: Improve the dashboard through modern web development — focusing on performance, usability, and compliance.
techvision-dashboard.problem: Outdated dashboard with poor UX — employees took too long to find key KPIs, and mobile use was impossible.
techvision-dashboard.solution: Completely new UI/UX design with real-time data visualization, role-based access, and mobile view.

bold-ideas.title: Bold Ideas Movement!
bold-ideas.description: Creative brand strategy and visual storytelling for an innovative startup with a dynamic web presence.
bold-ideas.overview: Bold Ideas Movement is a creative startup from Berlin specializing in sustainable innovations.
bold-ideas.goal: Develop a strong brand identity and a storytelling-driven website that excites investors.
bold-ideas.problem: Startup without a clear brand identity — no recognition value and weak conversion rate.
bold-ideas.solution: Complete brand design, storytelling website with animated scroll experience and lead generation system.

bella-cucina.title: Bella Cucina Restaurant!
bella-cucina.description: Elegant website with online reservation and digital menu for an upscale Italian restaurant.
bella-cucina.overview: Bella Cucina is an upscale Italian restaurant in Düsseldorf's old town.
bella-cucina.goal: Create an elegant, mobile-friendly website with online reservation and digital menu.
bella-cucina.problem: Phone reservations overwhelmed staff; the old website was not mobile-friendly.
bella-cucina.solution: Elegant responsive website with online reservation system, digital menu, and multilingual support.

smileforyou.title: SmileforYou – Conversion Optimization!
smileforyou.description: Full website redesign and conversion optimization for a leading German dental clinic chain, doubling their conversion rate from 5% to 11%.
smileforyou.overview: We worked with SmileforYou, a leading dental clinic chain specializing in orthodontics. Based on mobile-first analytics data, we renewed their entire digital presence.
smileforyou.goal: Redesign the website with a mobile-first approach to significantly increase conversion rates.
smileforyou.problem: Outdated website with a low 5% conversion rate and poor mobile experience.
smileforyou.solution: Complete website redesign with mobile-first approach and SEO-optimized landing pages — resulting in a 120% conversion rate increase.

technik-hoffmann.title: Technik Hoffmann – Fullstack Development!
technik-hoffmann.description: Complex fullstack website development for a German precision engineering company, featuring jQuery animated bubbles and cards view.
technik-hoffmann.overview: This project involved a team of 2 developers, 1 designer, and 1 QA tester for a precision engineering company.
technik-hoffmann.goal: Implement a complex, design-heavy corporate website with interactive jQuery animations.
technik-hoffmann.problem: A precision engineering company needed a sophisticated digital presence for their complex service portfolio.
technik-hoffmann.solution: Fullstack WordPress website with custom jQuery animations, interactive bubble-based service visualization.

wickie-agency.title: WICKIE – Digital Marketing Agency Redesign!
wickie-agency.description: Complete website redesign for a digital marketing agency, delivering a clean, responsive WordPress site.
wickie-agency.overview: WICKIE helps businesses create, manage, and improve their social media presence. They approached us for a website refresh.
wickie-agency.goal: Redesign and modernize WICKIE's website with a clean, responsive layout reflecting their brand.
wickie-agency.problem: An outdated website that no longer reflected the agency's expertise in digital marketing.
wickie-agency.solution: Full website redesign with a clean, responsive WordPress build preserving brand identity.

digidog-threejs.title: Digidog – Three.js & WordPress Integration!
digidog-threejs.description: Resolved complex Three.js and Elementor conflicts on our own agency website, implementing interactive 3D animations.
digidog-threejs.overview: This internal project involved implementing 3D animations with Three.js on WordPress while resolving Elementor conflicts.
digidog-threejs.goal: Implement SEO-optimized design with integrated Three.js 3D animation on WordPress.
digidog-threejs.problem: Three.js animations conflicted with Elementor's rendering pipeline.
digidog-threejs.solution: Separate development, staged integration, and manual codebase adjustments for smooth 3D experience.

jobsvs-recruitment.title: JobsVS – Recruitment Agency Website!
jobsvs-recruitment.description: Design implementation and SEO for a recruitment agency, featuring Personio API integration for automatic job listings.
jobsvs-recruitment.overview: JobsVS is a recruitment agency that enables companies and applicants to find each other. We handled design implementation and SEO.
jobsvs-recruitment.goal: Implement a responsive, SEO-optimized recruitment website with Personio API integration.
jobsvs-recruitment.problem: A recruitment agency needed automated job listing management to avoid manual data entry.
jobsvs-recruitment.solution: Responsive website with Personio API integration for automatic job display and comprehensive SEO services.

cibaria-italiana.title: Cibaria Italiana – Restaurant & eCommerce!
cibaria-italiana.description: Elegant website with eCommerce, online reservation, and culinary course booking for an authentic Italian restaurant.
cibaria-italiana.overview: Mario's restaurant brings culinary traditions of Genoa and Bologna to Vienna with homemade pasta and imported Italian products.
cibaria-italiana.goal: Build an elegant website with e-commerce, reservation, and course booking while maintaining brand identity.
cibaria-italiana.problem: An authentic Italian restaurant needed a strong digital presence to showcase their culinary experience.
cibaria-italiana.solution: Multi-functional website combining eCommerce, online reservations, culinary course bookings, and brand-true design.

monte-ofelio-group.title: Monte Ofelio Group – Multi-Brand Web Strategy!
monte-ofelio-group.description: Dynamic multi-website digital strategy for an Italian bar and food group in Vienna.
monte-ofelio-group.overview: The Monte Ofelio Group was founded by the Formisano brothers to bring Italian sustainability and naturalness to Vienna.
monte-ofelio-group.goal: Create a multi-website digital strategy for brand awareness and worldwide online product sales.
monte-ofelio-group.problem: A growing Italian food group needed a cohesive multi-brand digital presence for expansion.
monte-ofelio-group.solution: Three strategically aligned websites with online reservation, e-commerce, and integrated social media management.

ai-jewelry-sketch.title: AI Jewelry Sketch Automation!
ai-jewelry-sketch.description: Complete AI automation built in Make that reads customer emails, extracts requirements, and generates custom jewelry sketches 24/7.
ai-jewelry-sketch.overview: A jewelry business was spending 5–10 hours daily creating custom sketches. We built a complete AI automation in Make in just 6 hours.
ai-jewelry-sketch.goal: Eliminate manual sketch creation with end-to-end AI automation.
ai-jewelry-sketch.problem: Manual jewelry sketch creation from email requests consumed 5–10 hours daily.
ai-jewelry-sketch.solution: End-to-end AI automation in Make that reads emails, extracts requirements, and generates sketches 24/7.

fitpulse-app.title: FitPulse Health App!
fitpulse-app.description: Mobile-first fitness platform with AI-powered training plans and real-time progress tracking.
fitpulse-app.overview: FitPulse uses AI technology to create personalized training plans that dynamically adapt to each user's progress.
fitpulse-app.goal: Develop an AI-powered fitness app with adaptive training plans and gamification.
fitpulse-app.problem: Users abandoned generic training plans — lacking personalization and long-term motivation.
fitpulse-app.solution: AI-powered training plan engine with adaptive workouts, real-time tracking, and wearable integration.

smartassist-chatbot.title: SmartAssist AI Chatbot!
smartassist-chatbot.description: Intelligent AI chatbot with NLP integration for automated customer service and lead qualification.
smartassist-chatbot.overview: Developed for a mid-sized insurance company that manually processed hundreds of customer inquiries daily.
smartassist-chatbot.goal: Implement AI-powered customer communication that answers 80% of standard inquiries automatically.
smartassist-chatbot.problem: Overwhelmed customer service with long wait times — manual processing was expensive and slow.
smartassist-chatbot.solution: AI chatbot with NLP, automatic lead qualification, CRM integration, and sentiment analysis.

smarthome-iot.title: SmartHome IoT Platform!
smarthome-iot.description: AI-controlled smart home platform with automated energy optimization and predictive maintenance.
smarthome-iot.overview: For a leading smart home provider, we developed an AI platform that analyzes energy consumption in real time.
smarthome-iot.goal: Develop an intelligent IoT platform that reduces energy consumption by 30% with predictive maintenance.
smarthome-iot.problem: High energy consumption due to manual control and no predictive maintenance.
smarthome-iot.solution: AI-controlled IoT platform with real-time energy optimization, predictive maintenance, and voice control.

hubspot-dental-crm.title: HubSpot CRM – Dental Clinic Chain!
hubspot-dental-crm.description: Enterprise HubSpot CRM implementation across a 5-branch dental clinic chain with IVORIS API and Make.com automation.
hubspot-dental-crm.overview: Implemented HubSpot CRM for a multi-branch orthodontic clinic chain with five locations, integrating with IVORIS API.
hubspot-dental-crm.goal: Implement a unified CRM system across 5 branches that standardizes patient workflows.
hubspot-dental-crm.problem: Five branches with different workflows, no centralized CRM, and complex integration requirements.
hubspot-dental-crm.solution: Enterprise HubSpot CRM with unified processes, IVORIS API integration, and Make.com automation.

beoriginaltours-operations.title: BeOriginalTours Operations Platform!
beoriginaltours-operations.description: Automated booking, scheduling, and management platform for a European tour agency with Make.com, Python, and Next.js dashboard.
beoriginaltours-operations.overview: BeOriginalTours is a European tour agency where we automated the booking and scheduling process.
beoriginaltours-operations.goal: Automate the entire booking pipeline with a custom dashboard for full operational visibility.
beoriginaltours-operations.problem: Manual booking processing and scattered scheduling across spreadsheets leading to errors.
beoriginaltours-operations.solution: End-to-end automated architecture using Make.com, Python, MongoDB, Discord, and a custom Next.js dashboard.

luxe-mode.title: Luxe Mode Online Shop!
luxe-mode.description: High-end e-commerce solution with personalized recommendations and seamless checkout experience.
luxe-mode.overview: Luxe Mode is a premium fashion brand specializing in exclusive designer wear.
luxe-mode.goal: Build a custom e-commerce platform with AI-powered recommendations and optimized checkout.
luxe-mode.problem: High cart abandonment rate and no personalized product suggestions.
luxe-mode.solution: Custom e-commerce platform with AI recommendations, one-click checkout, and A/B-optimized funnel.

logitrack-warehouse.title: LogiTrack Warehouse System!
logitrack-warehouse.description: Custom warehouse management software with real-time tracking, barcode scanning, and automatic reordering.
logitrack-warehouse.overview: Developed for a growing logistics company that had reached its limits with Excel-based inventory management.
logitrack-warehouse.goal: Develop a scalable warehouse management solution reducing inventory errors by 95%.
logitrack-warehouse.problem: Manual inventory management with Excel — frequent errors, no real-time overview.
logitrack-warehouse.solution: Custom warehouse management software with real-time tracking, mobile barcode scanning, and shipping integration.

mediconnect-praxis.title: MediConnect Practice Software!
mediconnect-praxis.description: Custom practice management software with appointment scheduling, digital patient records, and billing module.
mediconnect-praxis.overview: Developed for a group practice in Düsseldorf struggling with outdated practice software.
mediconnect-praxis.goal: Replace outdated practice software with a modern, integrated solution.
mediconnect-praxis.problem: Outdated practice software without online booking — high administrative effort.
mediconnect-praxis.solution: Modern practice management software with online booking, digital records, billing module, and GDPR compliance.
